name: Almost-a-Meal Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Ground Beef; Brown and Drain
28 oz Tomatoes; Canned with Liquid, Chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the browned and drained beef, onions, tomatoes with liquid, Worcestershire sauce, and salt.
2. Spoon the mixture into a greased 3-quart casserole dish.
3. Layer the potatoes, flour, corn, lima beans, and diced peppers on top.
4. Cover and bake at 375°F for 45 minutes. Sprinkle with shredded Cheddar cheese (6 oz) and continue baking, uncovered, for an additional 30 minutes.
Very good for preparing ahead of time. To reheat, place foil loosely over the top and reheat in the oven for about 20 minutes.
